folio.label: 13r
folio.l: Ne studieth nought , ley hand to euäy man~
A non to drawe , euäy wygút bygan
And shortly to telle , as it was
Were it by auenture , or sort , or cas
The soth is this , the kut fel on the knygút
Of which ful glad , was euäy wygút
And telle he must his tale , as it was resou~

note.notetxt: 848different ink colour, lighter brown, probably from the parchment until the end of the tale.ODR

folio.l: As ©e han herd , what nedeth wordes mo
And whan æis good man , saugh æ it was so
As he æat wys was , and obedient´
To kepe his forward , by his free assent´
And seide , sithe , I shal begynne æe game
Welcome be the cutte , in goddes name
Now late vs ride , and herkeneth what I sey
And w æat word , we redyn forth oure wey
And he bygan , w rigút a mery chere
This tale a non , and seide on æis manere
¢ Iamque domos patrias scithice post aspera gentis , prelia laurigero et cetera
